lines.english: When there was only God the Master,
He Himself has staged His own drama;
O Nanak, there is no other Creator. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਬੰਧ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਸ ਕਉ ਗਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: tab bandh mukat kahu kis kau ganee |
lines.english: then who was called bound or liberated?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਨਰਕ ਸੁਰਗ ਕਹੁ ਕਉਨ ਅਉਤਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: tab narak surag kahu kaun aautaar |
lines.english: then who entered hell, and who entered heaven?
When there was only the Lord, Unfathomable and Infinite,
When God was without attributes, in absolute poise,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਸਿਵ ਸਕਤਿ ਕਹਹੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਠਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tab siv sakat kahahu kit tthaae |
lines.english: then where was mind and where was matter - where was Shiva and Shakti?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਆਪਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਅਪਨੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਧਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jab aapeh aap apanee jot dharai |
lines.english: When He held His Own Light unto Himself,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਕਵਨ ਨਿਡਰੁ ਕਵਨ ਕਤ ਡਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: tab kavan niddar kavan kat ddarai |
lines.english: then who was fearless, and who was afraid?
He Himself is the Performer in His own plays;
O Nanak, the Lord Master is Unfathomable and Infinite. ||2||
When the Immortal Lord was seated at ease,
When there was only God, the Perfect Creator,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਕਹੁ ਕਹਾ ਬਿਨਾਸਨ ॥
lines.translit: teh janam maran kahu kahaa binaasan |
lines.english: then where was birth, death and dissolution?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਕਹਹੁ ਕਿਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tab jam kee traas kahahu kis hoe |
lines.english: then who was afraid of death?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਚਿਤ੍ਰ ਗੁਪਤ ਕਿਸੁ ਪੂਛਤ ਲੇਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: tab chitr gupat kis poochhat lekhaa |
lines.english: then who was called to account by the recording scribes of the conscious and the subconscious?
When there was only the One Lord, unmanifest and incomprehensible,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਕਉਨ ਛੁਟੇ ਕਉਨ ਬੰਧਨ ਬਾਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: tab kaun chhutte kaun bandhan baadhe |
lines.english: then who was emancipated, and who was held in bondage?
When there was only the Immaculate, Incomprehensible, Unfathomable Master,
He Himself, in and of Himself, is the most wonderful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪੁਰਖ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeh niramal purakh purakh pat hotaa |
lines.english: When there was only the Immaculate Being, the Lord of beings,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਨ ਰੂਪ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਉਪਰਜਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak aapan roop aap hee uparajaa |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, He Himself created His Own Form. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਕਉਨ ਕਉ ਮਾਨ ਕਉਨ ਅਭਿਮਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: teh kaun kau maan kaun abhimaan |
lines.english: then who was honored, and who was dishonored?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੈਲੁ ਕਹਹੁ ਕਿਆ ਧੋਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: teh bin mail kahahu kiaa dhotaa |
lines.english: there was no filth, so what was there to be washed clean?
When there was only the Pure, Formless Lord in Nirvaanaa,
When there was only the Form of the Lord of the Universe,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਛਲ ਛਿਦ੍ਰ ਲਗਤ ਕਹੁ ਕੀਸ ॥
lines.translit: teh chhal chhidr lagat kahu kees |
lines.english: then who was tainted by fraud and sin?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਰੂਪੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jeh jot saroopee jot sang samaavai |
lines.english: When the Embodiment of Light was immersed in His Own Light,
O Nanak, the Creator is beyond calculation. ||4||
He is the Cause of causes, the Creator Lord.
then who was hungry, and who was satisfied?
When all power and wisdom was latent within Him,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਅਪਨੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਆਪਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jab apanee sobhaa aapan sang banaaee |
lines.english: When His Glory was contained within Himself,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਕਵਨ ਮਾਇ ਬਾਪ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਸੁਤ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tab kavan maae baap mitr sut bhaaee |
lines.english: then who was mother, father, friend, child or sibling?
then who considered omens to be good or bad?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਆਪਨ ਆਪੁ ਆਪਿ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jab aapan aap aap ur dhaarai |
lines.english: When He kept Himself, All-in-all, unto His Own Heart,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਬੇਦ ਕਤੇਬ ਕਹਾ ਕੋਊ ਚੀਨ ॥
lines.translit: teh bed kateb kahaa koaoo cheen |
lines.english: then where were the Vedas and the scriptures, and who was there to read them?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਕਉਨ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਕਉਨੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਚੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: teh kaun tthaakur kaun kaheeai cheraa |
lines.english: then who was called master, and who was called disciple?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਆਪਨ ਊਚ ਆਪਨ ਆਪਿ ਨੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeh aapan aooch aapan aap neraa |
lines.english: When He Himself was lofty, and He Himself was near at hand,
We are wonder-struck at the wondrous wonder of the Lord.
O Nanak, He alone knows His own state. ||5||
When the Undeceiveable, Impenetrable, Inscrutable One was self-absorbed,
When He paid homage to Himself,
then the three qualities were not prevailing.
then who was swayed by Maya?
When there was only the One, the One and Only Lord God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਕਉਨੁ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਕਿਸੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਚਿੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: teh kaun achint kis laagai chintaa |
lines.english: then who was not anxious, and who felt anxiety?
When He Himself was satisfied with Himself,
He is vast and infinite, the highest of the high.
then who spoke and who listened?
O Nanak, He alone can reach Himself. ||6||
When He Himself fashioned the visible world of the creation,
he made the world subject to the three dispositions.
Sin and virtue then began to be spoken of.
